hooks.command: bash -lc 'for candidate in python3 python; do PYTHON_BIN=$(command -v "$candidate") || continue; "$PYTHON_BIN" -c "import sys; raise SystemExit(0 if sys.version_info[0] == 3 else 1)" || continue; exec "$PYTHON_BIN" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/implementation_docs_symphplusplus/templates/codex_hooks/scripts/sympp_hook_nudge.py"; done; exit 0'
